# Purchase Stock Analytic

Copies the analytic account of the purchase order item to the stock move

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Create a purchase order
2. Set an analytic account and analytic tags on purchase order lines
3. Confirm purchase order
4. ... and you should have your analytic account and analytic tags on your stock moves

```{image} https://odoo-community.org/website/image/ir.attachment/5784_f2813bd/datas
:alt: Try me on Runbot
:target: https://runbot.odoo-community.org/runbot/87/13.0
```
